name: au-individual-return
description: > Use this skill whenever asked about Australian individual income tax for sole traders. Trigger on phrases like \"how much tax do I pay in Australia\", \"Australian tax return\", \"sole trader tax\", \"ABN tax\", \"Medicare levy\", \"LITO\", \"PAYG\", \"tax brackets Australia\", \"BAS\", \"instant asset write-off\", \"home office deduction\", \"HELP repayment\", \"HECS debt\", \"small business income tax offset\", \"motor vehicle deduction\", or any question about filing or computing income tax
author: openaccountants
